Thanks for the PR! Quick reminders:
- Run `npm run build` locally before pushing — broken MDX fails the build.
- One change per PR (typo + new page = two PRs).
- This repo publishes to docs.picpeak.app on merge to `main`.
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / clarity fix
- [ ] Outdated content corrected
- [ ] New page / topic
- [ ] Restructure (open an issue first to discuss scope)
- [ ] Tooling / config (Next.js, Nextra, build)

## Affected pages

<!-- List the URLs that change on docs.picpeak.app after this merges,

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] Screenshots updated if I changed UI text (or N/A)
- [ ] Internal links verified (no relative-path drift)
- [ ] If renaming or moving a page, considered whether to add a redirect
